verses.text: “ Topa na Pasian un amaute' leitang note hong piak minamte beisakin, note in amaute suankhia-in, amaute' khuapite leh innte-ah na ten' uh ciangin
Topa na Pasian un note' neih dingin hong piak gam sungah note-a' dingin khuapi thum na tuamkoih ding uh hi
Mi a thatkha peuhpeuh a tai theihna dingin Topa na Pasian un na neih dingun a hong piak leitang seh thumin khenin seh khat sungah khuapi khat ciat koihin a lampite na puah ding uh hi

Mi khat sing a phuk dingin a vengpa tawh gamlakah pai-in, sing a phuk dingin a khut tawh a hei vaanin, a heitang a ga panin kikhongin a vengpa kha-in a sih bang danin, mi khat in sawmlohpi, a beisa hunah amah tawh kigal neihna om lopi-in a vengpa a sihsak khak leh, hih khuapite khat peuhpeuhah amah tai-in a nuntakna hu thei ding hi

Tua bang hi kei leh, amah in a beisa hunah a vengpa tawh kigal neihna neilo ahih manin sihna ding thu omlo napi-in, a hehna tawh phula nuampa in mi that khapa delhin lampi a gamlatna hangin amah pha-in a si dingin liamsak khading hi
Tua ahih ciangin, khuapi thum tuamkoih un, ci-in note thu a hong pia ka hi hi

“Note in Topa na Pasian uh itin, ama lampi zuih tawntungna tawh tuni-a kong gen hih thupiakna khempeuh limtakin na zuih uh a, amah in na pu na pate uh tungah a kiciam mah bangin Topa na Pasian un na gamgite uh hong keeksakin, na pu na pate uh piak dingin a ciam leitang note tungah hong piak leh, hih khuapi thum banah khuapi thum mah na behlap ding uh hi
Tua hi kei leh Topa na Pasian un luah dingin note hong piak leitang tungah mawhbaanglo mi kithat khading a, tua mi thahna hanga mawhna note' tungah hong tu ding hi
“Ahih hangin mi khat in a vengpa mudahin, amah pangsim a, amah satin liamsakin a sihsak a, tua mipa hih khuapi khat peuhpeuhah a tai leh
ama khua upate in amah hong puakin hong paipih ding uh a, a sih theihna dingin phulapa tungah ap ding uh hi
Note na nopsak theihna dingun amah hehpih loin, Israel-te sung panin mi thatpa na beisak ding uh hi
“ Topa na Pasian un na neih dingun hong piak leitang tungah note' kep ding na gamhluahna sung uhah khanglui mite in a phuhsa na vengte' gisuang na khin kei ding uh hi.

“Mi khat in a hihkhak mawhna lian ahi a, khialhna khat peuhpeuh a gamtatna-ah ahi zongin tua mipa' langah teci khat guak kicinglo ding a, teci nih ahih kei leh teci thum bang thugenna tawh mawhsakna kikipsak bek ding hi
Elna lungsim a nei teci khat in mi khat gamta khial hi, ci-in a mawhsak leh
thuneite a langnih tuakin, tuahun laitaka siampite leh thukhente' mai, Topa' mai-ah pai ding uh hi
Thukhente in limtakin kan ding uh a, tecipa pen zuau teci hi-in, a manlopi-in a sanggampa a mawhsak ahih leh
a sanggampa tungah amah in hih dinga a sawm bang teekin ama tungah na hih ding uh hi. Tua bangin note sung panin gitlohna na siangsak ding uh hi
Tua hi leh a omlai mite in za-in lau ding a, note lakah tua bang gitlohna bawlkik ngei nawnlo ding uh hi
Amah na hehpih kei ding uh hi. Nuntakna tangding nuntakna, mit tangding mit, ha tangding ha, khut tangding khut, khe tangding khe na hisak ding uh hi.
